author: anon-13168fa2
content: Resolved as part of #38 Windows Rust install work. The new 'Installing Rust Tools Later' subsection in 00-foundations/04-your-workspace.md between the Rust install and Node.js sections covers: where cargo install puts binaries (~/.cargo/bin with Windows equivalent), PATH semantics after install, the 'close and reopen terminal' fix for command not found, verify-with-version habit, and compile time patience. All four bullets from the original issue are addressed.
